findings.message: mod.ts has 93 non-export/non-comment lines — barrels must be export-only
type 'PluginRuntimeConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
type 'PluginRegistryConfig' uses non-standard suffix — convention is <Function>Options / <Noun>Spec
exported function 'discoverLocalPlugins' uses non-standard prefix 'discover' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'findPluginEntryPoint' uses non-standard prefix 'find' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'sortPluginsByDependencies' uses non-standard prefix 'sort' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
exported function 'mergePlugins' uses non-standard prefix 'merge' — consult STANDARDS § 4.1
README missing 12/12 mandated sections (Overview, Quickstart, Mental model, API, Recipes, Configuration, Testing, Observability, Architecture, Stability, Compatibility, License)
no tests/ directory and no inline *_test.ts files — every package needs meaningful tests
mod.ts does not export an `inspect<Noun>()` diagnostic — recommended discoverability axis
